chapter_title.en: Punishment of betrayal of trust, theft, drinking wine and fornication

text: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ أَبِی الْقَاسِمِ عَنْ هَارُونَ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ مَسْعَدَهَ بْنِ زِیَادٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ آبَائِهِ ع أَنَّ النَّبِیَّ ص قَالَ: یَجِی ءُ مُدْمِنُ الْخَمْرِ یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ مُزْرَقَّهً عَیْنَاهُ مُسْوَدّاً وَجْهُهُ مَائِلًا شَفَتُهُ یَسِیلُ لُعَابُهُ مَشْدُودَهً نَاصِیَتُهُ إِلَی إِبْهَامِ قَدَمَیْهِ خَارِجَهً یَدُهُ مِنْ صُلْبِهِ فَیَفْزَعُ مِنْهُ أَهْلُ الْجَمْعِ إِذْ رَأَوْهُ مُقْبِلًا عَلَی الْحِسَابِ.

en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs: 4. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Abi al-Qasim from Harun b. Muslim from Mas’ada b. Ziyad from Abi Abdillah from his forefathers (a.s.) that The Prophet (s.a.w.s.) who said: “When a drunkard comes on the Day of Judgment, he would be blind and his face, black. His back will be bent and spit will be overflowing from his mouth. His forehead will be tied to his toes. His hands will be coming out of his loins. The people assembled there will be horrified upon seeing the way he is taken for the accounting of his deeds.”
